  • Field Details

    • STRUCTURAL_EQUALITY

      public static final HashCode STRUCTURAL_EQUALITY
      Structural equality and hash code for program elements.

      To be considered equal, the types of the objects must match, except for certain allowed combinations with UncollatedReferenceQualifiers.
      In case of Identifieror Literals, the textual representations are compared, while Modifierare compared by type only.
      NonTerminalProgramElements are compared child-by-child in the given order. Note that the corresponding iterator reports all children without separation. In case that two children of the same type play different roles (e.g. return types of methods and thrown exceptions if there was no need for a method name), this behavior must be overriden.
      The function does not compare comments or indentation information. Instead, the toSource method can be used to perform a more stringent comparison.

      The hash code calculated takes into acount the type of the element, its name if it is a NamedProgramElementand the number of its children. For reasons of efficiency, no further recursion is performed.

    • NAMED_MODEL_ELEMENT_ORDER

      public static final Order NAMED_MODEL_ELEMENT_ORDER
      Lexical order objects comparing (short) names of named model elements.

    • UNAMBIGUOUS_ORDER

      public static final Order UNAMBIGUOUS_ORDER
      Lexical order objects comparing full names, positions and units if necessary.
